description: A set of straps and a soft pad, intended to hold a placard or a panel in order to form a chest rig.  This one is in the X pattern: shoulder straps cross each other at the back.

name.str: Haley Strategic X-harness chest rig kit

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:multicam>

name.str: Haley Strategic X-harness chest rig kit

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:multicam_black>

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:black>

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:coyote>

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:ranger>

name.str: Haley Strategic X-harness chest rig kit

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:grey>

name.str: Haley Strategic X-harness chest rig kit

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  This one features a custom paint job, turning the harness into a representation of all things American: the flag, a bald eagle, fireworks, and loose rounds of .50 BMG.

notes: width and length acquired from visual reference
height presumed from the listed height of the placard
negative trim is to account for the buckles
width and length acquired from visual reference
height presumed from the listed height of the placard
negative trim is to account for the buckles
width and length acquired from visual reference
height assumes from the listed height of the placard

//longest_side: the pad is flexible but unable to roll up

//ablative: making this pocket ablative allows the chassis to be damaged
more importantly, it shows the chassis clearly among the worn items, thus making inventory management more obvious when the player is dealing with the rig
pocket_data.//moves: not to upset the balance of chassis pocket moves

//use_action: ideally, this should be 1 + 1 slots, separately
each slot is on a separate shoulder strap and cannot be coerced to form a single double-width slot

//notes: these dimensions and the resulting volume make no sense, but this is likely the best we can assess without actual dimensions or a viable reference
for the sake of sanity while managing migrations, using the T.REX harness as reference, we pretend that this harness can also host a gun sling
description: A set of straps and a soft pad, intended to hold a placard or a panel in order to form a chest rig.  This one is in the H pattern: shoulder straps are connected by a textile bridge at the back.  An embedded set of retainers allow holding a gun sling, or a gun attached to one.

name.str: Direct Action H-harness chest rig kit

variants.description: A pair of shoulder straps connected by a textile bridge, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:multicam>

name.str: Direct Action H-harness chest rig kit

variants.description: A pair of shoulder straps connected by a textile bridge, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:black>

name.str: Direct Action H-harness chest rig kit

variants.description: A pair of shoulder straps connected by a textile bridge, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  This one features a custom paint job, turning the harness into a representation of all things American: the flag, a bald eagle, fireworks, and loose rounds of .50 BMG.

notes: length assumed to be valid for the length between the bridge and the buckle
width assumed from visual reference, reliant on the fact that the slightly-narrower T.REX reference harness is 2-in. wide
height assumed from visual reference
negative trim is to account for extra plastic parts
length assumed to be valid for the length between the bridge and the buckle
width and height assumed from visual reference
negative trim is to account for extra plastic parts
width and length acquired from visual reference
height presumed from the listed height of the placard
negative trim is to account for the buckles
we presume the initial dimensions of the DWARF harness are that of the bridge
we also presume that the dimensions are equivalent to a straight-line bridge, rather than its visual bent shape
height assumed from visual reference

//ablative: making this pocket ablative allows the chassis to be damaged
more importantly, it shows the chassis clearly among the worn items, thus making inventory management more obvious when the player is dealing with the rig
pocket_data.//moves: not to upset the balance of chassis pocket moves

//use_action: the harness has a lot more than two slot, but since we can't separate them, for balance reasons, we keep it down to 2 slots
